'''Melina Carniss''' was a [[Color/Legends|dark]]-[[Hair/Legends|haired]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] dance choreographer for [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba Desilijic Tiure]] who also served as a secret security officer.

==Biography==
===Early years===
{{Quote|She worked for Jabba on Tatooine. She filled a niche that would have been in the middle of his security apparatus, but she was Jabba's own agent. Formally, she was his dance coordinator. Good head on her shoulders. She understands a lot of the business, but is a bit shy on experience.|Talon Karrde about Melina Carniss|<ref name="bacta">''[[X-Wing: The Bacta War]]''</ref>}}
Melina Carniss served as a dancer and later a dance choreographer for [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba Desilijic Tiure]] at his [[Jabba's Palace/Legends|palace]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]. She was also a secret security officer at the palace. In [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]], she attempted to arrest [[Mara Jade Skywalker|Mara Jade]], disguised as a dancer named Arica, when Jade tried to grab a blaster from one of the palace guards. Carniss thought Jade was part of an [[Assassin/Legends|assassination]] attempt on Jabba by one of his rivals, [[Valarian/Legends|Lady Valarian]]. However, Jade was not trying to [[Death/Legends|kill]] Jabba, but instead [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]], who was meeting with the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]].<ref name="SOF" />

Carniss took Jade into custody and led her out of the throne room to the dungeons. However, as she turned Jade over to the [[Gamorrean/Legends|Gamorrean]] guards, Jade used [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] to turn Carniss's [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]] muzzle, causing her to shoot one of the Gamorreans. The guards turned on Carniss with their [[Force pike/Legends|force pikes]], giving Jade time to escape.<ref name="SOF" />

===The Bacta War===
{{Quote|A woman working for Talon Karrde had previously been employed by Jabba the Hutt. Subsequent to his death she spent a couple of years in abject poverty on Tatooine. Karrde took her in and has helped her get back on her feet, but her taste for fine things has never been satisfied—nor has her ambition. Karrde appointed her to liaise with the Antilles people—Booster Terrik, in fact—an old friend from Kessel.|Fliry Vorru about Melina Carniss|<ref name="bacta">''[[X-Wing: The Bacta War]]''</ref>}}
Two [[Standard year/Legends|years]] after the [[Death/Legends|death]] of Jabba, she was recruited by smuggler chief [[Talon Karrde]], but she became a [[Spy/Legends|spy]] of [[Ysanne Isard]] during the [[Bacta War]] of [[7 ABY/Legends|7 ABY]]. Carniss provided information regarding a smuggling shipment in the Alderaan system, leading to an [[Second ambush in the Graveyard|ambush]] by Captain [[Ait Convarion]]'s [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] [[Corrupter/Legends|''Corrupter'']]. The attack was repulsed successfully by [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]]' group. Karrde discovered her treachery and wanted to eliminate her immediately. However, [[Booster Terrik]] managed, with difficulty and at great expense, to persuade Karrde to leave her alive long enough to use her to feed misinformation to Isard and ultimately set the stage for the [[Battle of Thyferra]]. She captained the [[YT-1210 light freighter/Legends|YT-1210]] freighter ''[[Empress' Diadem]]'' during the Bacta War, which was hit by [[Turbolaser/Legends|turbolaser]] fire from the [[Executor-class Star Dreadnought/Legends|super star destroyer]] ''[[Lusankya/Legends|Lusankya]]'' while serving as a missile platform during the final battle.<ref name="bacta" /> Following the end of the Bacta War, Karrde executed her.<ref name="NEG-Char">''[[The New Essential Guide to Characters]]''</ref>

Two years later, Karrde would encounter a woman named Celina Marniss (an anagram of Melina Carniss), who turned out to be Mara Jade. He hired her soon after he discovered this.<ref name="1stCon">{{JournalCite|1|First Contact}}</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
In [[Timothy Zahn]]'s 1995 short story, "[[Sleight of Hand: The Tale of Mara Jade]]," he described the character of Melina Carniss as dark-haired, wearing a red jumpsuit, and crouching over the rancor pit after Oola was dropped in.<ref name="SOF" /> This was later overridden, and the character in the red jumpsuit became [[Laudica]]. A Human female with black hair, wearing a white dress first appeared in the [[The Star Wars Trilogy Special Edition|Special Edition]] release of [[Star Wars: Episode VI Return of the Jedi|''Star Wars'': Episode VI ''Return of the Jedi'']], but it is unconfirmed whether this character is Melina Carniss.

''[[X-Wing: The Bacta War]]'' strongly implied that Carniss was in fact killed when the ''Empress' Diadem'' was fired upon by the ''Lusankya'': the point of view from ''Lusankya''<nowiki/>'s bridge described the destruction of a disc-shaped Corellian freighter matching her description. However, ''[[The New Essential Guide to Characters]]'' contradicted this.
